info.name: Aldar Conversational Analytics
info.description:
Natural-language analytics over smart-grid telemetry. The LLM produces a constrained JSON query plan; pandas performs all calculations. Every response is traceable (filters, operation, columns, rows considered, formula).

**Base URL:** set the `baseUrl` variable (default `http://localhost:8000`).

**Typical flow:**
1. `GET /health` — confirm backend is running
2. `POST /upload-csv` — upload `data/Smart_Grid_Master_March_2026.csv`
3. `GET /profile` — inspect schema
4. `POST /ask` — run assessment questions
5. `POST /reset-session` — clear multi-turn state (optional)

variable.description: Set automatically after the first /ask response via a test script.

request.description: Returns service status, git commit, working directory, and whether a dataset is loaded.
Upload the dataset. Returns a schema profile (columns, types, row count, sample values) that the planner uses on subsequent /ask calls.
Returns the cached schema profile of the currently active dataset.
Clears the active dataset from memory. Next /ask will fail until a new CSV is uploaded.

item.name: Ask — Assessment Q1 (average load, North District, week 2)
Ask — Assessment Q2 (peak generation March 12 + companion load)

request.description: Expected top asset: WIND_01. Maintenance is mapped deterministically to status_code == 505.

item.name: Ask — Assessment Q4 (solar business vs off-peak)

request.description: Expected business-hours average ≈ 31.66 kWh. Peak hours 07–10 and 17–20 per the brief.
Sends a short follow-up that reuses filters (time range, metric) from the previous question via session_id captured in the first /ask response.
Debug endpoint. Returns the multi-turn conversation state for the given session.
Clears multi-turn memory for this session.
